CONFIRMED. Primary CBC source read in full (first 1718 of 3568 lines) plus all spec IDs grepped. transferrin_pass_3.json read in full. Relevant batch files grepped for CBC/iron/oxygen spec IDs. Findings: (1) cbc_hematology_pass_3.json contains 22 spec IDs covering mch (×2), mchc (×2), rdw_cv (×2), rdw_sd (×2), monocyte_pct (×2), monocytes_abs (×3), mpv (×2), pdw (×1), neutrophil_pct (×2), rbc (×4). Uses investigation_spec_contract_version: 3.0.0. signal_system: 'hematologic' throughout — matches PSI schema allowed values. trigger_direction values: 'high' or 'low' only — no obsolete 'both'. (2) transferrin_pass_3.json contains 3 spec IDs: inv_transferrin_high_iron_deficiency_transport_upregulation, inv_transferrin_low_inflammatory_negative_acute_phase_suppression, inv_transferrin_low_visceral_protein_depletion_or_synthetic_failure. (3) Batch_3_Pass_3.json: hematocrit (×3), lymphocyte_pct (×2), lymphocytes_abs (×2). (4) Batch_4_Pass_3.json: inv_ferritin_low_iron_store_depletion, inv_ferritin_high_iron_overload_context, inv_ferritin_high_inflammatory_hyperferritinemia. (5) Batch_6_Pass_3.json: inv_mcv_high_megaloblastic_macrocytosis, inv_mcv_high_nonmegaloblastic_macrocytosis, inv_mcv_low_microcytosis_iron_deficiency; plus lym_low/lym_high. (6) Batch_7_Pass_3.json: wbc (×3). CRITICAL FINDING: NO hemoglobin (hgb) or haemoglobin spec found in any Pass_3 file inspected. Candidate clusters 'haemoglobin low / oxygen-carrying-capacity' and 'haemoglobin high / erythrocytosis-context' have NO source research available. These clusters MUST be classified as DEFER_INSUFFICIENT_SCHEMA_SUPPORT and explicitly reported. Cursor must not invent hemoglobin spec content from memory.

changes.finding: CONFIRMED. P1-10 compile manifest index and one representative PSI + compile_manifest read. Established pattern: (a) target root: knowledge_bus/generated_pilot/p1_11_batch_b/; (b) per-cluster subdirectory named pkg_<id>_<signal>_<pattern>/; (c) each contains promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml + compile_manifest.yaml; (d) batch root contains p1_11_batch_b_compile_manifest_index_v1.yaml; (e) all entries: runtime_active: false, governance_runtime_activation_status: inactive_promoted_batch_b; (f) PSI must include translation block with work_id: P1-11 and source fields; (g) promoted_signal_intelligence_contract_version: 1.0.0 required; (h) schema_version: 1.0.0 required.

CONFIRMED. Schema read in full. Status: LOCKED. Key constraints: (1) signal_system_allowed includes 'hematologic' — all CBC/iron/oxygen signals correctly map here. (2) trigger_direction_allowed: high, low, bidirectional, context_dependent — 'both' is obsolete and must never appear. (3) Forbidden root keys: hypotheses, hypothesis_ranking, narrative, rendering, presentation, display, report_layout, ui_hints — investigation spec hypotheses must NOT be carried into PSI. (4) Required signal fields: signal_id, research_domain, signal_system, primary_metric, trigger_direction, activation, states, supporting_markers, contradiction_markers, missing_data, confidence, override_rules, evidence, confirmatory_test_refs. All derivable from investigation spec v3 source content. (5) Lifecycle fields (runtime_activation_state, medical_review_status, scoring_readiness) are NOT in the PSI schema — they belong in compile_manifest.yaml, sprint report, and Batch B manifest. Cursor must not add these to promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml.

CONFIRMED. backend/scripts/validate_promoted_signal_intelligence.py EXISTS. Must be run against every new or changed promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml file. Output must be recorded in sprint report §9 and final report. If validator is not found at runtime or fails, Cursor must stop and report failure — must not mark validation PASS via self-assertion.

changes.finding: The promoted_signal_intelligence_schema_v1.yaml explicitly forbids: hypotheses, hypothesis_ranking, narrative, rendering, presentation, display, report_layout, ui_hints at the root level. The investigation spec v3 sources contain rich hypothesis and narrative content that MUST NOT be carried into the promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml. PSI receives only the signal-layer primitives: activation, states, supporting_markers, contradiction_markers, missing_data, override_rules, evidence, confirmatory_test_refs. Lifecycle and governance fields (medical_review_status, scoring_readiness, runtime_activation_state) are captured in compile_manifest.yaml and sprint report only.

inv_mchc_high_spherocytic_hemolysis_pattern (in cbc_hematology_pass_3.json) involves hereditary spherocytosis and hemolytic pathology — an area requiring medical review before clinical-facing interpretation. The PSI can be created as a staged non-runtime artefact, but the safety framing in the sprint report must note that MCHC-high signals involve hereditary membrane disorder and hemolytic interpretation that warrants DEFER_MEDICAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED or PROMOTE_PARTIAL_STAGED_PSI_WITH_BLOCKERS classification in the manifest. Do not use diagnostic language.

overall_verdict: HARDENED. All five front-matter fields confirmed. All 7 prerequisites confirmed present. All required source files read directly — content cross-referenced against PSI schema vocabulary. PSI schema (LOCKED v1.0.0), validator (validate_promoted_signal_intelligence.py), and P1-10 staging pattern all confirmed. change_type CONTENT correct. Three hardening notes for Cursor: (1) Hemoglobin clusters must be deferred DEFER_INSUFFICIENT_SCHEMA_SUPPORT — no Pass_3 hemoglobin spec exists in any inspected source file; (2) PSI forbidden fields (hypotheses, hypothesis_ranking, narrative) must not appear in promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml — signal-layer primitives only; (3) Tooling file .cursor/rules/healthiq-knowledge-bus-medical-intelligence.mdc is available for use but must NOT be committed to the sprint branch (SOP v1.3.1 tooling leakage prohibition — Stage 4A must verify). One advisory note: MCHC-high spherocytosis pattern warrants DEFER_MEDICAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED or PARTIAL classification. No STOP conditions triggered. Cursor may proceed under TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH governance.
